channel.title: Posts on Kenneth Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Kenneth Blog

item.title: Greetings and...
item.description: Hi everyone, apparently, this is a blog I have created just now. I’ll post something on it. It could be my daily life, something that I was interested in and so on. If you want to ask me why did I bulid this blog. I will tell you that it is my hobby. I’ll try to keep on daily upload, if I didn’t write anything for so long you can just ping me.

item.title: Python level-5 Certificate!
item.description: Ohhhhhh! Just received my python level five certificate from Chinese Institute Of Electronics. I cannot express how excited I am to receive this unique certificate. You see, the Python levels certificate from Chinese Institute Of Electronics is divided into six levels and I already made five of them! That means I’ll be “graduate” from python after I get the last one.
